title: Giro hacia el libre mercado de Cuba no logra convencer a EE.UU.
title_cn: 古巴转向自由市场未能说服美国
summary: Cuba enfrenta dificultades para convencer al gobierno de Donald Trump de que sus reformas económicas más ambiciosas en décadas son suficientes para impulsar los cambios que exige Estados Unidos. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 美联储戴利认为通胀放缓，警告不确定性
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco President Mary Daly says inflation should start to slow but the economic outlook remains uncertain during a Bank of Spain event in Santander, Spain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Employment Picture ‘Just OK,’ BlackRock’s Rieder Says
title_cn: 贝莱德的里德表示，美国就业情况“还好”
summary: Rick Rieder, global fixed income CIO at BlackRock, says “hiring is stable, but I would say, broadly unimpressive,” as he examines the June US jobs report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adani Flagship Seeks $1 Billion Via Placement, Terms Show
title_cn: 条款显示阿达尼旗舰公司寻求通过配售筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as 100 billion rupees ($1 billion) through a sale of shares to institutional investors as the ports-to-power conglomerate led by billionaire Gautam Adani overcomes legal challenges in the US.

title: CoreWeave Junk Bonds Drop as Investors Question AI Boom

title_cn: 印度计划扩大石油储备以防范价格飙升
summary: India plans to build larger oil inventories, expand storage capacity and deepen supply partnerships to hedge against the kind of price volatility seen during the Iran war.

title_cn: 两家蓝猫头鹰私人信贷基金在赎回请求后设置上限
summary: For the second straight quarter, two Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit funds were hit with the industry’s largest redemption requests, forcing the manager to again cap withdrawals.

title: Congo Plans First Stock Market as AI Mineral Boom Draws Interest
title_cn: 随着人工智能矿产热潮引起人们的兴趣，刚果计划建立第一个股票市场
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo is drawing up plans for its first stock exchange as it seeks to attract more investment to an economy that’s benefiting from soaring demand for minerals critical to the artificial intelligence buildout.

title: US Hiring Slows Sharply, Curbing Recent Job-Market Momentum
title_cn: 美国招聘急剧放缓，抑制了近期就业市场的势头
summary: US hiring slowed sharply in June even as the unemployment rate fell, curbing some of the budding momentum in job growth this year.

title: Here Are the Key Takeaways From the US Jobs Report for June
title_cn: 以下是美国六月就业报告的主要内容
summary: Here are the key takeaways from the June US employment report released Thursday:

title: US Stocks Advance as Jobs Data Dims Prospect of Fed Rate Hike
title_cn: 就业数据削弱美联储加息前景，美股上涨
summary: US stocks rose as slower-than-expected job growth drove traders to dial-back bets that the Federal Reserve could start raising interest rates as soon as this month.

title: Jobs Report Great for Warsh and Bonds, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
title_cn: 贝莱德的罗森伯格表示，就业报告对沃什和债券来说非常有利
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the systematic multi-strategy fund at BlackRock, says the June jobs report will help Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh be patient on rates as well as benefit the bond market. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Investors Pull Back as Central America Rallies Go ‘Too Far’
title_cn: 由于中美洲反弹“太过分”，债券投资者撤退
summary: Investors are pulling back from a niche trade in Central American and Caribbean government bonds that delivered some of the best returns in emerging markets in recent years.

title: Stocks Rise as Jobs Fuel Bets Fed to Stay on Hold: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 就业推动股市上涨，押注美联储将继续按兵不动：市场结束
summary: A slower-than-anticipated increase in US jobs drove stocks higher and short-dated bond yields fell on bets the Federal Reserve won’t be forced to raise interest rates any time soon.

title: Springbok Emblems May Get Protection Before All Blacks Visit
title_cn: 跳羚标志可能会在所有黑人访问之前得到保护
summary: South Africa proposed protecting the commercial rights to the Springboks’ upcoming rugby tour against New Zealand’s All Blacks, a move aimed at safeguarding sponsorship revenue.

title: Adani, IHC Sign MOU for $11.5 Billion India Aluminum Project
title_cn: 阿达尼与 IHC 签署 115 亿美元印度铝项目谅解备忘录
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s flagship Adani Enterprises Ltd. and Abu Dhabi’s International Holding Co. plan to invest $11.5 billion in an aluminum project in the eastern state of Odisha, as the Indian conglomerate continues to build on its metal sector ambitions.

title: Treasuries Gain as Weak Jobs Report Dims Fed Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 由于就业报告疲软削弱美联储加息押注，美国国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rallied after a weaker-than-expected jobs report prompted traders to scale back expectations that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates in the coming months.

title: Saudi Oil Flows Hit 90% of Pre-War Rate as Ships Exit Hormuz
title_cn: 随着船舶驶出霍尔木兹海峡，沙特石油流量达到战前水平的 90%
summary: Saudi Arabia’s crude oil exports have surged close to their pre-war levels as the kingdom starts getting its tankers through the Strait of Hormuz again, one of the most emphatic indications yet that Persian Gulf shipments are normalizing in the wake of an interim peace deal between the US and Iran.

title: BlackRock Partner Securitize Rides Wall Street Tokenization Wave
title_cn: 贝莱德合作伙伴证券化掀起华尔街代币化浪潮
summary: Carlos Domingo spent years trying to persuade investors that stocks, bonds and private funds would one day live on blockchains — an idea that stayed largely confined to crypto’s fringes.

title: US Adds Fewer Jobs Than Expected in June, Unemployment Rate Falls
title_cn: 美国6月新增就业岗位少于预期，失业率下降
summary: US hiring slowed sharply in June as nonfarm payrolls increased 57,000 last month after downward revisions to the prior two months, according to Bureau of Labor Statistics data out Thursday. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Food Watchdog Targets Energy Drinks Including Red Bull for Misbranding
title_cn: 印度食品监管机构针对红牛等能量饮料品牌进行错误标识
summary: India’s food regulator has issued notices to at least six energy-drink makers including Red Bull GmbH’s local unit, for allegedly making misleading claims, tightening oversight of a rapidly expanding category in the country.

title: Oil Deepens Slide as Saudi Exports Reach 90% of Pre-War Levels
title_cn: 沙特出口达到战前水平 90%，油价进一步下滑
summary: Oil deepened its slide below pre-war levels as Saudi Arabia ramped up crude exports toward normal rates, extending the recovery in flows from the Persian Gulf and heightening the prospect of a supply surplus.

title: French Heat Wave May Have Slashed Corn Crop by Up to a Third
title_cn: 法国热浪可能导致玉米产量减少三分之一
summary: A heat wave that swept across western Europe last week may have damaged almost a third of French corn, further worsening crop prospects in the region’s top grower.

title: Tech Rally Chasers Make Calls Priciest Since 2007 Next to S&P
title_cn: 科技股追逐者的通话价格为 2007 年以来最高，仅次于标准普尔
summary: Normally, a three-month, 30% rally in the Nasdaq 100 Index would tempt investors to take the money and run. But right now, they’re betting the advance is just getting started.

title: Banks Get Bids on $49 Billion Paramount Debt Well Before Sale
title_cn: 银行在出售 490 亿美元的至高债务之前就已收到投标
summary: Banks have lined up enough investor demand to cover most of the roughly $49 billion debt package backing Paramount Skydance Corp.’s takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. — long before launching the deal.

title: Genneia Files for the First Argentine IPO in the US Since 2019
title_cn: Genneia 申请自 2019 年以来首次在美国进行首次公开​​募股
summary: Power producer Genneia SA filed for an initial public offering in New York, trying to become the first Argentine company to IPO in the US in at least seven years.

title: US Premarket Movers for July 2, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 7 月 2 日美国盘前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures were little changed as of 7:53 a.m. New York time as investors rotate out of the high-flying momentum stocks that powered last quarter’s rally.

title: Leveraged ETFs Are Just the Tip of the Iceberg
title_cn: 杠杆ETF只是冰山一角
summary: Record leverage is sweeping through the financial system, exposing hedge funds, banks, retail traders and money market funds to potential mounting losses.

title: Why Marlinspike Is Investing in America's Defense Boom
title_cn: 为什么马林斯派克投资于美国的国防繁荣
summary: Marlinspike Partners just raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to "rearm America," the latest sign that investors are piling into defense startups. Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, who also served six years as a US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Analyst Debut Set to Test $2.2 Trillion Valuation
title_cn: SpaceX 分析师首次亮相将测试 2.2 万亿美元估值
summary: Investors in SpaceX have been largely flying blind since the company’s record-breaking IPO last month, with few financial projections to help determine what the stock is actually worth.

title: South Africa’s Grocery War Shifts From Search to AI Conversation
title_cn: 南非的杂货战争从搜索转向人工智能对话
summary: South Africa’s online grocery battle is entering a new phase where the competition is no longer just about delivering groceries faster, but rather about making shopping itself almost disappear.

title: How Phone Culture Is Reshaping Chinese Society
title_cn: 手机文化如何重塑中国社会
summary:
Think smartphones dominate American culture? China may have taken the mobile-first lifestyle to another level.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Dan Wang, author of Breakneck, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how phone culture is reshaping Chinese society — from ordering a croissant for delivery in minutes to livestreaming shopping trips at the mall. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean AI Rout Drags Emerging Stocks to Three-Week Low
title_cn: 韩国人工智能溃败将新兴股市拖至三周低点
summary: Developing-world currencies rallied on Thursday after weaker-than-expected US employment data prompted investors to scale back expectations for an October Federal Reserve interest-rate hike, boosting risk assets as the dollar weakened.

title: Oilfield-Contractor Pay Hits Fresh Record as War Spurs Drilling
title_cn: 战争刺激钻探，油田承包商工资创下新纪录
summary: Wages for oilfield-services workers climbed for a third straight month in May, setting a fresh record as the Iran war drove up crude prices and companies increased drilling.

title: One Leveraged ETF Is Reshaping Trading in World's Top AI Memory Stock
title_cn: 一只杠杆 ETF 正在重塑全球顶级人工智能存储股票的交易
summary: A Hong Kong fund tied to SK Hynix has grown so large that it's beginning to move the stock it was built to track.

title: Billionaire Arnault Lauds Mathematics in €50 Million Alma Mater Gift
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿尔诺向母校赠送价值 5000 万欧元的数学礼物
summary: Bernard Arnault extolled the virtues of mathematics after pledging a record €50 million donation for a planned maths research institute at his alma mater, highlighting the discipline’s importance in a world increasingly shaped by AI.

title: Microsoft Mobilizes 6,000 Workers to Help Customers Adopt AI
title_cn: 微软动员 6,000 名员工帮助客户采用人工智能
summary: Microsoft Corp. is setting up a new organization with 6,000 employees to help businesses with the technical and strategic work of deploying artificial intelligence.

title: AI Debt Binge Fueling Private Bond Market | The Close 7/1/2026
title_cn: 人工智能债务热潮推动私人债券市场|收盘价 7/1/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders, Jefferies Tech Sector Leader, Software/Internet Research Brent Thill, Union Square Advisors President & Co-Founder Ted Smith, Guggenheim Partners Senior Analyst of Retail & E-Commerce Simeon Siegel, Kayne Anderson Rudnick Portfolio Manager, Senior Research Analyst Julie Biel, Bank of America Co-Head of Global FICC Sales Rashaan Reid, Ramp Economist Ara Khazarian, The Conference Board Chief Economist Dana Peterson, & Chuck E. Cheese CEO Scott Drake.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood CEO on AI, Expansion & Trump Accounts
title_cn: Robinhood 首席执行官谈人工智能、扩张和特朗普账户
summary: Robinhood Markets is expanding in the UK and Europe with a new offering of agentic AI and perpetual futures, a type of derivative investment, with crypto trading expected to come to the UK "soon". It's part of a broader international push, even as the field of fin-tech apps in the UK and the EU grows increasingly competitive. Vlad Tenev - CEO and co-founder of investment platform joined Caroline Hepker and James Woolcock on Bloomberg radio to discuss the changes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Loses EU Top Court Fight Over €4.1 Billion Android Fine
title_cn: 谷歌在欧盟最高法院就 Android 系统罚款 41 亿欧元的诉讼中败诉
summary: Google lost its long-running fight against a €4.1 billion ($4.7 billion) European Union antitrust fine after the bloc’s top judges said regulators were right to punish the US giant for abusing Android’s market power.

title: Meta Looks to Make Money From Its AI Spending Binge
title_cn: Meta 希望通过其 AI 支出狂潮来赚钱
summary: The company is considering a cloud computing business to help generate revenue from AI

title: Skyroot Plans India’s First Private Sector Rocket Launch in July
title_cn: Skyroot 计划于 7 月发射印度首次私营部门火箭
summary: Skyroot Aerospace Pvt announced that it was gearing up for the debut launch of Vikram-1 — India’s first privately designed and developed orbital rocket — between July 12 and August 4, in what would be a critical milestone for the country’s first space unicorn after facing several delays.

title: Finance and Tech Cut 28,000 Jobs Monthly as AI Takes Hold
title_cn: 随着人工智能的兴起，金融和科技行业每月裁员 28,000 人
summary: Signs of slower hiring, attrition and companies deciding not to replace exiting workers.

title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Stake to US Government: FT
title_cn: OpenAI 拟向美国政府授予 5% 股份：FT
summary: OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer. The Financial Times reported that executives proposed the move as part of a broader arrangement under which Washington would hold 5% of each of the leading American AI developers. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Plans to Offer AI Compute in US at 10-Gigawatt Scale
title_cn: 软银计划在美国提供 10 吉瓦规模的人工智能计算
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. and its telecom unit will start renting AI computing resources to US companies next fiscal year, using a growing pipeline of data centers to compete with the likes of CoreWeave Inc. and Nebius Group NV.

title: SAP Restricts Hiring, Travel to Fund ‘Significant’ AI Push
title_cn: SAP 限制招聘和差旅以资助“重大”人工智能推广
summary: SAP SE said it will cut back hiring and travel to save costs as Europe’s largest software company devotes more resources to developing artificial intelligence technologies and fending off new competitors.

title: Chip Stocks Slump Across Asia as Global Tech Selloff Intensifies
title_cn: 随着全球科技股抛售加剧，亚洲芯片股暴跌
summary: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday, tracking tech losses on Wall Street after Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to develop a business that would sell access to AI computing power raised worries about overcapacity.

title: Leveraged ETF Tied to SK Hynix Is Whipsawing Markets
title_cn: 与 SK 海力士挂钩的杠杆 ETF 正在冲击市场
summary: Analysts say the emergence of a leveraged exchange-traded fund tied to semiconductor firm SK Hynix has grown so large, so fast, that it is magnifying swings in both the stock and South Korea's entire Kospi index. Bloomberg's Charlotte Yang reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Wall Street Women Who Traded Finance Careers for Influencer Success
title_cn: 华尔街女性放弃金融职业换取影响力成功
summary: These pros ditched spreadsheets and trading floors to go after brand deals and social media fame.

title: Lombard Odier Urges Tech Exposure 'At the Market Weight'
title_cn: Lombard Odier 敦促“按市场权重”公开技术
summary: Lombard Odier's EMEA CIO Nannette Hechler-Fayd'Herbe discusses the outlook for tech stocks, volatility and where she sees opportunities beyond artificial intelligence and semiconductors. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kospi Falls as Chip Selloff Spreads
title_cn: 随着芯片抛售蔓延，Kospi 下跌
summary: Stocks fell as a selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, reviving concerns the rally in artificial intelligence shares may have gone too far. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WhatsApp’s Username Revamp Faces India Test Over Fraud Risks
title_cn: WhatsApp 用户名改版面临印度欺诈风险考验
summary: India asked Meta Platforms Inc. to delay for now the rollout of a new feature that lets users pick their own WhatsApp handles on fears it could fuel online fraud, marking the country’s latest pushback against US internet companies.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/2/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/2/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MGX Raises $49 Billion for AI Deals
title_cn: MGX 为人工智能交易筹集 490 亿美元
summary: MGX has raised $49 billion for one of the biggest ever funds dedicated to artificial intelligence deals, propelling the two-year-old Abu Dhabi firm into the ranks of the most consequential investors in the sector globally.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Chip Selloff Leads Equities Lower
title_cn: 韩国芯片抛售导致股市走低
summary: Stocks fell as a selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, reviving concerns the rally in artificial intelligence shares may have gone too far, too fast. Bloomberg's Avril Hong reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BitGo: Volatility Strengthens Infrastructure Case
title_cn: BitGo：波动性增强基础设施案例
summary:
Angela Ang, APAC MD of BitGo, a digital asset infrastructure company, believes that shifts from retail speculation to institutional investors drive demand for secure custody and compliant infrastructure. Her comments come on the back of bitcoin falling to a fresh 21-month low.
She speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Proposes Giving the US Government a 5% Stake, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称 OpenAI 提议给予美国政府 5% 的股份
summary: OpenAI has begun preliminary discussions about giving the US government a 5% stake in the ChatGPT-developer, the Financial Times reported, citing two people familiar with the talks.

title: European Nations Now Believe Some Hormuz Fees Are Inevitable
title_cn: 欧洲国家现在认为一些霍尔木兹收费是不可避免的
summary: Some leading European powers now accept that ships transiting the vital Strait of Hormuz will have to pay fees to Iran and Oman, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: First US Hypersonic Weapon Program Faces Further Delay, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国首个高超音速武器计划面临进一步推迟
summary: The US’s first hypersonic weapon, already at least two years late for deployment in the field, is facing delays yet again — this time over unresolved production issues, according to congressional auditors.

title: Boeing Made Progress on Air Force One Modifications, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，波音公司在空军一号改装方面取得了进展
summary: Boeing Co. reduced some of the technical challenges dogging its delayed delivery of two jets that will serve as Air Force One, according to congressional auditors.

title: Cuba’s Bold Free-Market Turn Fails to Convince US It’s Ready to Change
title_cn: 古巴大胆的自由市场转向未能让美国相信它已做好改变的准备
summary: Cuba is struggling to convince the Trump administration that its most ambitious economic reforms in decades are enough to spark the changes the US is demanding.

title: Death Toll Rises to 20 After Massive Russian Air Attack on Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯大规模空袭基辅后死亡人数上升至20人
summary: The number of fatalities increased to 20 in Kyiv following overnight Russian missile and drone attacks on the Ukrainian capital that were among the most intense of the year so far.

title: Ocasio-Cortez Backs Progressive El-Sayed in Michigan Senate Race
title_cn: 奥卡西奥-科尔特斯在密歇根州参议员竞选中支持进步派埃尔-赛义德
summary: Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has endorsed Michigan candidate Abdul El-Sayed in that state’s US Senate primary, throwing another progressive voice behind him in the race to face off against Republican Mike Rogers.

title: South Africa to Probe Ex-Leader Zuma as He Meets Gupta Brother
title_cn: 南非将调查前领导人祖马会见古普塔兄弟
summary: South Africa’s Department of International Relations will probe Jacob Zuma’s visit to India where he met Ajay Gupta, who alongside his brothers is accused of orchestrating widespread government corruption during the former president’s time in office.

title: AI Anxiety, AI Cash Are Powering This Election Cycle (Video)
title_cn: 人工智能焦虑、人工智能现金正在推动这一选举周期（视频）

title: EU Officials Fear Leaders Will Balk in Confronting China
title_cn: 欧盟官员担心领导人在对抗中国时会犹豫不决
summary: The European Union’s latest bid to reset its trade and economic relationship with China is already floundering, with some member states and officials involved in the planning skeptical that the bloc is ready to take decisive action should diplomacy fail.

title: Germany Readies €12 Billion Contract For Warships From TKMS
title_cn: 德国准备与 TKMS 签订价值 120 亿欧元的军舰合同
summary: German lawmakers are set to approve a €12 billion ($13.7 billion) order of up to eight submarine-hunting frigates from defense manufacturer TKMS AG& Co. KGaA in one of the biggest military procurements for Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s ruling coalition this year.

title: Takaichi, Modi Deepen Economic Ties to Cut Reliance on China
title_cn: 高市和莫迪深化经济联系以减少对中国的依赖
summary: India and Japan agreed to deepen cooperation on energy, technology and defense during Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s first official visit to New Delhi, as the two Asian powers seek to reduce their dependence on China and build more resilient supply chains.

title: Flood Re to Cut Insurance Payouts to Richest UK Households
title_cn: 洪水再保险将削减英国最富有家庭的保险支出
summary: The UK’s flood insurer of last resort is unfairly favoring wealthier households and will be reformed to reduce the burden of multimillion-pound payouts, the government said Wednesday.

title: Democrats Gain Ground in Tough Battle for Senate
title_cn: 民主党在参议院的激烈争夺中取得进展
summary: A spate of new polling makes the race look more competitive than expected

title: Nigeria’s Reforms Revered by Markets Become Political Problem for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚受到市场推崇的改革成为蒂努布的政治问题
summary: Seated beneath a large red canvas umbrella outside Nigeria’s main stock exchange in Lagos, Sulaimon Isiaka watches traders, bankers and executives stream past his newspaper stand each day.

title: Starmer Gives Apology But No Payments to Forced Adoption Victims
title_cn: 斯塔默道歉但没有向强迫收养受害者付款
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer apologized to the victims of decades of forced adoptions in Britain’s post-war period, but stopped short of offering immediate compensation to affected mothers and their offspring.

title: Britain’s ‘Frustrating’ Search for New Chief to Fix Stats Crisis
title_cn: 英国“令人沮丧”地寻找新主席来解决统计危机
summary: One of Britain’s most senior statisticians said she’s frustrated by the long wait to install a new chief who can fix a crisis of confidence around the country’s economic data.

title: Russia Indicates Ukraine Fired Long-Range Ballistic Missile
title_cn: 俄罗斯表示乌克兰发射了远程弹道导弹
summary: Russia indicated that Ukraine may have used a long-range ballistic missile in combat for the first time.

title: Khamenei’s Funeral Draws Chinese and Russian Dignitaries to Iran
title_cn: 哈梅内伊葬礼吸引中俄政要前往伊朗
summary: Iran is set to host foreign officials from key backers including China and Russia this weekend for the funeral of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

title: South Africa’s DA Head Vows to Enforce Consultation in Coalition
title_cn: 南非发展议程负责人誓言加强联合磋商
summary: The leader of the Democratic Alliance, South Africa’s second-largest political party, will enforce broader consultation in the nation’s ruling coalition as he reiterated his commitment to the alliance.

title: NZ’s Peters Fears Potential Curbs on Indian Migration
title_cn: 新西兰总理彼得斯担心印度移民可能受到限制
summary: New Zealand is preparing to tighten immigration rules for Indian nationals, a move Foreign Minister Winston Peters says could harm relations between the two nations, the Post reported Thursday, citing a person it didn’t identify.

title: USMCA Upset Crashes Mexico’s World Cup Party
title_cn: USMCA 的不满导致墨西哥世界杯派对崩溃
summary: It’s another uncertainty for ties that already entangle trade, migration, fentanyl, autos and politics.

title: Germany Offers €10 Billion Tax Relief as Reforms Move Ahead
title_cn: 随着改革的推进，德国提供 100 亿欧元的税收减免
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition agreed on €10 billion ($11.4 billion) in annual income tax relief and a range of measures to bolster Germany’s labor market as part of a set of reforms designed to revive economic growth and stabilize the budget.

title: Scandal Over Missing Haitian Kids Spurs Tougher Migration Oversight in Chile
title_cn: 海地儿童失踪丑闻促使智利加强移民监管
summary: Though the children were quickly located, uproar over the incident sparked further scrutiny of a community that once found refuge in the South American nation.

title: EU to Lift Tariffs From Armenia in Bid to Pull Trade From Russia
title_cn: 欧盟将取消对亚美尼亚的关税，以拉动与俄罗斯的贸易
summary: The European Union has announced new trade measures that will see up to 80% of Armenia’s exports to the bloc enter tariff-free.

title: Russia Used Shadow Fleet for Europe Drone Campaign, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，俄罗斯使用影子舰队进行欧洲无人机行动
summary: Russia most likely used its fleet of banned oil tankers to help conduct a drone campaign over sensitive sites in Europe to map out weaknesses in air defenses, according to a report from the International Institute for Strategic Studies.

title: Germany Rejects Trump’s Demands for NATO Loyalty to Washington
title_cn: 德国拒绝特朗普要求北约效忠华盛顿的要求
summary: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius pushed back against calls by US President Donald Trump that European allies within NATO should be unconditionally loyal to Washington.

title: Nigeria's Market Rally Becomes A Political Problem
title_cn: 尼日利亚市场反弹成为政治问题
summary: Nigeria is undergoing a financial revival, with the country's benchmark stock index surging 52% in dollar terms this year, making it the world's fourth-best performer.  But while President Tinubu's economic overhaul is celebrated in financial markets, many everyday Nigerians still feel left out. Chief Africa Correspondent Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Seeks Chinese-Made Chips, Tech Selloff Extends into Asia | Daybreak Europe 7/2/2026
title_cn: 苹果寻求中国制造的芯片，科技股抛售蔓延至亚洲欧洲黎明 7/2/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Bloomberg understands that Apple is in negotiations to buy chips from two Chinese semiconductor firms which are currently on a Pentagon blacklist. Sources say CEO Tim Cook has appealed to Trump administration officials to help soften the political fallout from any possible deal with the Chinese chipmakers.

A selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, after a Bloomberg scoop on Meta's cloud business plans raised concerns over the speed of the AI buildout.  

Today's guests: Hetal Mehta, St James's Place, Chief Economist & Marc Chowrimootoo, Hayfin, Portfolio Manager & Co-Head of Direct Lending. (Source: Bloomberg)
